column1: Hey madison, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book?
word thats where I'll be too!
how many ppl in your group?
that solid! you all from the same school?
firee campus y'all gotta be havin a good time over there lol
I'll send over a breakdown of how booking works and pricing right now. Were yall lookin to start getting things secured today?
Probably not today but just so I can show them the option
cool all good. ill send what we have mind just keep in mind things change daily and availability is low this time of year
is it cool if I send through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it
hey morningg did that email with the options get to you
hey madison did you get to look over the spring break options
hey any word what wanna do for spring break?
yoo what's up madison it's Spiffy from Spring Break U. hope summer went smooth
y'all lookin to plan anything for spring break this school year?
Actually yeah we're looking at Cabo
okay bet ill send the options over. do you know which week your spring break is?
hey! aight cool thats been the most popular week
im gonna send you info for our Riu Santa Fe package, its pretty dope
btw theres a requirement that one person in each room has to be 21+. are a few of you 21?
Yes! I think we all will be but 2 people
yea thats fine that'll work still
how many ppl total we thinkin?
Oh bet that's perfect. Gonna send that over now what's the best email to send to?
Yoo sorry for the Delay, you should have got an email a few mins ago lmk if you got it
Hey!!! Still looking at Cabo... do u have any other hotel suggestions?
hey hey, yea we have another option. not really feelin the Riu Santa Fe package we have? I can send you the other
Yes pls... we just want a second option to give our group
yea no prob. will send that right now, its our Tesoro package
Loved “yea no prob. will send that right now, its our Tesoro package”
just sent that over, lmk if it came through
I don't think I got that
word I'll try again, also may want to check your promotions or spam folders sometimes it gets filtered since theres pricing in it
Just got it! Gonna share with my group and we'll be back to u. Thanks!!
okay bet! yea lmk what everyone thinks. down to hop on a call or anything later if needed
Liked “okay bet! yea lmk what everyone thinks. down to hop on a call or anything later if needed”
hey Madison! how are things looking with the group?
Good!! We're actually thinking of booking tn or tmrw!
okay cool yea lets do it! did we decide on Riu or Tesoro?
We're taking a group vote lol. I will let u know! Thanks for all your help
LOL. okay cool sounds good. just lmk and I'll set it up
lets do it! still 10 ppl rn?
And um the rest of the group booked without us so it's just 2...
actually itll have to be march 1-6
okay dope, will send this in a sec
just sent that over through email. will text it here too
let me know if you need help navigating the reservation. the email has a a deeper step by step
Ok don't hate me can we pay the first payment tmrw and like we will 1000% do it im just not with my friend rn
yea thats cool no worries. will adjust that
Thanks for all ur help! I'm excited to book!
yea excited for y'all! just updated the date
Ahh sorry about that! Mistake on my end
Will send you a new link
Yup all inclusive. All you can eat and all you can drink on resort
lmk if you need any help getting situated on the reservation today!
hey checkin in, if you have any questions lmk!
I sent the link too to some other friends and I think they're gonna reach out to do it as well!
word yea I saw that. sounds good I can also add them to yours if anything just lmk
Oh fire thank u!! I'll keep u posted
hey hey, did any of those friends want to just be added onto your reservation?
Hey! Yes! I'm gonna send them ur number
got it! Sarah right? she just reached out
Hiii. Can I add someone to our room or no
This one fr wants to be added
hey yea lemme put the request in
hey checkin in, she ready to go for today?
yoo Madi did you still want to add that 3rd person or nah
sup Madison! just checkin in. you'll be getting some more details via email in a few days with like where to find transportation when you land, party pass sched, etc.
if you have any questions just lmk
Hey we're in Cabo but definitely gonna miss our transfer.
if so youre all good. theyre waiting for you
No my friend got stopped by customs
yea all good. they'll still be waiting for you. everything okay though?
We are not going to make the transfer.
they wont leave you its all good. we have other travelers still coming in as well
Oh well uh my friend is at the police station so we're waiting for that
Hopefully we'll be out of here by 3:45
Damn yea they'll get ya for that
do you have to wait at the airport or would you wanna head to the resort?
We'll be heading to the resort hopefully soon but if they have to leave we understand
If you want to set a time I can let them know
Idk how long this stuff takes
do you plan on waiting as long as it takes or would you head out by 4 if shes not back yet
I'm at the police station with her so I'm not sure. Were 5 min from the airport
Gotcha. I'll let them know and also let our team on the ground know
Don't think we're making 4;00 but we are good she's okay
I just got info that the main transportation vehicle left so there's now a private transfer for you two which has an extra charge
totally up to you if you want to or not, I understand if not
Ok that's fine. Thanks for your help sorry that was wild
No we want to. We need a ride lol
lol I'm just glad y'all alright
